name: Finetune Protein Language Model
description: Generate higher accuracy predictor for a protein property of interest, incorporating experimental data. Finetune ESM, ProtT5, and Ankh on your protein sequences and corresponding properties. Save your trained model as its own tool for future inference.
capabilities: Generate higher accuracy predictor for a protein property of interest, incorporating experimental data
Finetune ESM, ProtT5, and Ankh on your protein sequences and corresponding properties
Save your trained model as its own tool for future inference

training_data.description: CSV file with protein sequences and corresponding property values for finetuning

sequence.description: Protein sequence for inference with the finetuned model
